title: NR17 1BY, Wayland Farms Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/UP3936RL/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Wayland Farms Limited   Installation name: Cherry Tree Farm   Permit number: EPR/UP3936RL/V002   "
